layout.main: two-pane: LEFT panel ~440px wide 'Pending Assignment 9 tasks' list grouped by project (project header in caps + count, then task rows: title + ID + status tag like Signed Off / Scope Change / Pre-Sign Off + overdue counter on right). RIGHT panel empty placeholder 'Select a task to view details and assign'

interaction: clicking a left-panel task fills the right detail pane with assignment options (assign to teammate, split, reassign etc.)
